positive: A mystical, stylized mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant sunset sky. The composition is centered, featuring highly stylized, geometrically complex peaks and flowing cosmic nebulae colors (deep purples, sapphire blues, glowing oranges, and soft pinks). Foreground elements include stylized, ancient celestial symbols and minimalist, abstract flora growing from the peaks. The art style should be a fusion of Art Deco symmetry and ethereal, cosmic realism, rendered with sharp lines, high contrast, and clean, printable vector quality, suitable for printing on dark fabric. Golden hour lighting emphasizes dramatic contrast and depth. Minimalist, clean, and impactful.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, messy, cluttered, photo-realistic, grimy, amateur, jpeg artifacts
